steps.title: Locate the youngest age in the table
steps.content: Scan the Age column for the smallest number: 3, 6, 7, and 11 years. The minimum value is 3 years.

steps.title: Match the minimum age to the bear identification number
steps.content: The bear with age 3 years is identification number 122. The remaining bears—157, 123, and 117—are all older. That matches choice D — D is correct.
